prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-ODORELIMINATOR-GALLON Product Type: TEXTILE_DEODORIZER Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: Gear Aid Revivex Odor Eliminator, All-Natural Formula for Tents, Footwear and Sports Gear, 1 Gallon Description: Use Revivex Odor Eliminator to get rid of bad smells, not just mask it. Previously known as Mirazyme, this concentrated blend of water-activated microbes removes the odor causing smells.

Apply as spray or soak to treat hard to wash items like tents and wetsuits. Or add it to a machine wash to keep gear fresh each season. This gentle formula can be used on a variety of fabrics including neoprene, fleece, spandex, Lycra and cotton.

Remove bad odors from all types of outdoor fabrics naturally with Revivex Odor Eliminator. Search Terms: odor eliminator pet odor eliminator shoe odor eliminator car odor eliminator smoke odor eliminator cat odor eliminator foot odor eliminator bathroom odor eliminator room odor eliminator kitchen odor eliminator fabric odor eliminator dog odor Features: - Size: 1 Gallon - Eliminate odor causing smells from all types of odors including pets, water, waste and perspiration with this powerful, all-natural formula (previously Mirazyme) - Use the concentrated formula with water-activated enzymes that penetrate fabric pores to remove odor; treat multiple garments with just half an ounce in 20 gallons of water - Soak outerwear, tents, athletic clothes, shoes, and pet gear with this gentle solution; also effective on neoprene, nylon, polyester, and GORE-TEX fabrics - Spray or soak for hard to wash gear; compatible with washing machines and available in 2 fl oz and 10 fl oz, and 1 gallon === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Gear Aid Revivex Odor Eliminator, 1 Gallon

anthropic.title_differentiation: All-Natural Enzymes, Water-Activated Microbes, Removes Pet And Fabric Odors, Spray Or Soak, Concentrated Formula

openai.title_differentiation: All-Natural Formula, Water-Activated Microbes, Removes Pet Smoke And Sweat Odors, Safe For Tents Shoes And Gear
